calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Edit Alexandrian, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party(by telephonic): Persove
No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $75 per pay period. The levying officer is instructed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2008 Off Calendar
